mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS falls or stays at very low levels, the discount rate on equities is subdued and liquidity conditions support risk assets, so S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days are positive.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not higher than unconditional returns when FEDFUNDS is below its trailing 12-month median, or if the sign of the relationship is negative in a rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend marks deteriorating household income and weaker cyclical demand, which should pressure equities lower over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if SPX posts positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of instances where UNRATE has risen by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months, or if the conditional rank correlation is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained pickup in RSAFS indicates stronger retail demand and near-term revenue acceleration, which should lift S&P 500 prices over the next 5 trading days as investors revise sales expectations upward.
failure_condition: Reject if short-horizon SPX returns are not positive after above-trend RSAFS growth, or if the effect disappears once the sample is restricted to months with stable inflation.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in INDPRO signals weaker industrial output and margin pressure for cyclical firms, so S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days should be negative when production softens materially.
failure_condition: Reject if SPX returns are not below baseline after a 0.5% two-month decline in INDPRO, or if the sign turns positive in more than half of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST and GDPC1 both accelerate, the signal indicates broad demand strength and resilient future cash flow growth, which should produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-growth state in HOUST and GDPC1 does not outperform either series alone, or if 60-day forward SPX returns are not positive in the majority of joint-acceleration observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in CPIAUCSL combined with an unchanged or rising FEDFUNDS rate increases real-rate pressure and policy tightening risk, which should reduce S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates > 0.2pp while FEDFUNDS is flat or rising over 1 month
regime_hint: inflation scare with delayed policy response
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not show weaker 20-day SPX returns than untriggered episodes, or if positive returns occur in more than 60% of inflation-acceleration events despite a flat/rising policy rate.

mechanism_narrative: During a post-shock recovery, falling UNRATE and rising PAYEMS confirm labor-market repair, which should support equity multiples and generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward SPX returns are not stronger when UNRATE is declining and PAYEMS is rising together, or if the joint labor-repair state fails to beat either single-series condition.

mechanism_narrative: In a manufacturing slowdown, weak INDPRO together with weak HOUST signals synchronized cyclical contraction in goods production and construction, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and HOUST both fall over the same 2-month window
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous declines in INDPRO and HOUST do not lead to below-average 5-day SPX returns, or if the sign is not negative in most joint-downturn episodes.
